steps.t: You have arrived at the foot of Weathertop to discover that Orcs from the South have made their way to the crest. Candaith awaits your assistance in d…
A small force of goblins greeted you at the foot of Weathertop. Candaith has sent you upon the path to the left, while he will clear the path to the r…
Somewhere above you on the path, Candaith waits to speak with you again. You have defeated two of the leaders of the Orc war-band.
The Uruk-hai expedition lies in ruins. You have won the day. You should speak with Candaith.
